existing_route_first: Validate the selected route hint against scan resolver output.
Ensure the selected route is a listing page, not a detail route.
Read the existing route source from the repo.
Audit existing semantic slots before generating anything.
Parse and classify imported route components.
Optionally use the coding LLM to adjudicate opaque existing components.
Preserve original route source when patching.
Mark setup complete with no branch, preview, or PR when all required pieces already exist.
from_scratch_only: Generate a brand-new article listing route.
Potentially add a site navigation link to the new route.
Create and commit a setup branch.
Start a hosted Cloudflare/GitHub Actions preview.
Run hosted browser and visual style gates.
Create the setup PR after approval.
shared_when_changes_required: Produce component audit, manifest, dependency, and static artifacts.
Use hosted preview as the approval gate.
Create PR only after successful preview approval.

existing_route_decision.reason: No existing route is being reused; Content Factory will create a new scaffold.

existing_route_flow.description: Use the selected `/blog`, `/articles`, `/insights`, or equivalent listing route as source of truth.
existing_route_flow.title: User selects existing route

existing_route_flow.description: Require scan resolver status `matched`, a concrete route file, and a listing/index surface.
existing_route_flow.title: Validate route hint

existing_route_flow.description: Read the exact route file from the repository default branch.
existing_route_flow.title: Load matched route source

existing_route_flow.description: Build surface plan, resolve repo paths, parse imports, and load imported component snippets when needed.
existing_route_flow.title: Build route audit context

existing_route_flow.description: Check slot markers, source heuristics, imported components, and repo component slot mappings.
existing_route_flow.title: Run deterministic audit

existing_route_flow.description: Mark every required slot as `exists`, `missing`, or `needs_generation` with evidence.
existing_route_flow.title: Classify required slots

existing_route_flow.description: Ask the coding model for structured slot classification only when deterministic confidence is low.
existing_route_flow.title: Use LLM adjudication if needed

existing_route_flow.description: If every slot and support module exists, complete setup without branch, preview, or PR.
existing_route_flow.title: Complete if ready

existing_route_flow.description: Create only missing registry, author, SEO, resources, or placeholder support files.
existing_route_flow.title: Generate missing support files

existing_route_flow.description: Incrementally patch the existing route while preserving layout, imports, copy, classes, and design-system components.
existing_route_flow.title: Patch missing UI slots

existing_route_flow.description: Write audit, LLM patch plan, original route source, manifest, dependency, and static reports.
existing_route_flow.title: Persist existing-route artifacts

existing_route_flow.description: Run dependency, static, build, hosted preview, browser, style, approval, and PR gates only when repo changes are needed.
existing_route_flow.title: Run shared gates if changed

from_scratch_flow.description: Create durable setup status and track requester, repo, parent scan, and route hint metadata.
from_scratch_flow.title: Initialize setup run

from_scratch_flow.description: Load brand, domain, target repo, content, model, and scan metadata.
from_scratch_flow.title: Fetch organization config

from_scratch_flow.description: Resolve the target repository, token, and default branch.
from_scratch_flow.title: Refresh GitHub repo auth

from_scratch_flow.description: Gather route tree, package/build metadata, repo paths, and framework signals.
from_scratch_flow.title: Scan repository

from_scratch_flow.description: Determine framework, runtime family, route conventions, and scaffold strategy.
from_scratch_flow.title: Classify repository

from_scratch_flow.description: Build directory, support-root, content-root, route, strategy, and adapter contract.
from_scratch_flow.title: Synthesize repository contract

from_scratch_flow.description: Load visual context, style profile, component candidates, code fingerprint, and article surface detections.
from_scratch_flow.title: Load generation context

from_scratch_flow.description: Ensure the scaffold plan is actionable and block unsupported plans without a safe path.
from_scratch_flow.title: Validate plan

from_scratch_flow.description: Capture or reuse visual/style context, build surface plan/page spec, and plan optional site navigation.
from_scratch_flow.title: Load directory context

from_scratch_flow.description: Record that no existing route is being reused, or audit a generated route after rendering.
from_scratch_flow.title: Inspect existing directory route

from_scratch_flow.description: Persist article surface plan, page spec, site link plan, and any component audit.
from_scratch_flow.title: Plan directory surface

from_scratch_flow.description: Generate listing route, support modules, placeholders, diagnostics, and semantic repairs.
from_scratch_flow.title: Render directory page

from_scratch_flow.description: Check imports, registry wiring, semantic slots, and generated route dependencies.
from_scratch_flow.title: Validate directory dependencies

from_scratch_flow.description: Block unsafe dynamic APIs, eager article-body imports, and unscaffolded category links.
from_scratch_flow.title: Verify static policy

from_scratch_flow.description: Run local build gate and revalidate dependency/static checks after repair overrides.
from_scratch_flow.title: Verify directory build

from_scratch_flow.description: Create setup branch and stage generated files plus managed existing-file updates.
from_scratch_flow.title: Prepare branch

from_scratch_flow.description: Verify the branch contains the concrete route and files needed for article publishing.
from_scratch_flow.title: Prove publish surface

from_scratch_flow.description: Dispatch the hosted Cloudflare/GitHub Actions preview for the setup branch.
from_scratch_flow.title: Start hosted preview

from_scratch_flow.description: Wait for hosted preview output and require an exact setup route preview.
from_scratch_flow.title: Publish hosted preview

from_scratch_flow.description: Load the hosted preview and confirm it renders the real article listing page.
from_scratch_flow.title: Verify browser

from_scratch_flow.description: Compare hosted preview against target visual/style context and block if it fails.
from_scratch_flow.title: Review visual style

from_scratch_flow.description: Expose preview-ready approval only after exact preview and quality gates pass.
from_scratch_flow.title: Await review

from_scratch_flow.description: Create the setup PR only after explicit hosted preview approval.
from_scratch_flow.title: Create PR after approval
